creator: meetshamsher@gmail.com
text:
Ohk.
One more thing in addition to that. I build all in ports/net/work/dpdk...
with helloworld changes. Then passing all required images (contigmem.ko,nic_uio.ko,helloworld,testpmd) to DUT (device under test). In DUT all required changes in load.conf done and modules loaded. If i remove (rte_delay_ms(...)) either in helloworld (where edited) or testpmd (already present) then everything is showing as expected. Like hellworld o/p or in testpmd getting testpmd> prompt. Which seems to be very strange to me. Let me know if any process/image i missed.

Note: yes we are about to migrate to 11.2, but currently working in 10.4
Thanks & regards,
Shamsher
